params.deps: { rulesEngine: <module exports from section-1>, strategyTable: <module exports from section-2> }

createGameStateMachine(deps).notes: Factory function exposed by section-3 for app-shell to instantiate the state machine and inject the rules-engine and strategy-table modules. App-shell wires the dependencies once at boot and passes the resulting instance to ui-render and hint-and-review.

notes: App-shell is the only place the state machine is constructed. App-shell does NOT call dispatch() or getState() in steady state — those flow through ui-render and hint-and-review. App-shell may call dispatch() exactly once to dispatch the initial 'deal' if the desired UX is auto-deal-on-load (Overseer judgment); default is to wait for the user's first Deal click.
